creator: NORCALFULUA@GMAIL.COM
text:
Northern California Free Unix & Linux Users Association's (NORCALFULUA) goal is to assist members with Unix-Like Operating Systems & spreading their use around the Northern California Region. EMAIL  For more information on how to assist in this endeavor and please visit Northern California Free Unix & Linux Users Association
